name: Below Par Golf Lounge
about: Below Par Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator and club regripping facility located in Osage, Iowa. The venue features customized golf simulators from Uneekor, a trusted brand by PGA Tour professionals. It offers a relaxed environment for golfers to play on virtual courses and receive golf club regripping services. The facility is open Tuesday through Sunday from 12:00 PM to 9:00 PM and provides rental clubs for those without equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor simulators trusted by PGA Tour professionals
Convenient rental clubs available for players without equipment
Flexible booking options for various time durations
Additional golf services like club regripping

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed
BYOB policy likely as no bar service is mentioned

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, a limited number of golf sets are available to rent if you don't have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is likely allowed as no bar service is mentioned. No food service is specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but the venue offers hourly bookings ranging from 1 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all skill levels including beginners and children.
